title: Holdable Frogs
description: Allows frogs to be handheld, after which the frog's tongue is usable to pull faraway entities closer, as well as to obtain froglights.
body:
This mod makes frogs holdable in Minecraft!

# How I made this mod

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MtlOta6l8ZI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# How exactly?

First, you need to craft a Frog Holder.

![The crafting recipe for the Frog Holder item.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1858f2e2c25621c02f40d23adf567a7e659f9548.png)

Then, you need to find a frog. You can then use this Frog Holder on a frog. Doing so will place the frog in your hand. That's it! Once you have the frog in your hand, using it will cause it to shoot out its tongue and pull toward you any entity it hits.

# Visual Frog Holding Guide

Find a frog.

![The Frog Holder item being held while looking at a frog.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f46ddb8134dce35a3fed57046bedc22540a0fbd9.png)

Use the Frog Holder on the frog to pick it up.

![A frog being held.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9aa8fa658ee7ece4844b4485040e864228d31cbc.png)

# What can I do with a Handheld Frog?

You can do many things with a Handheld Frog! Namely, you can pull stuff. For example, you can pull fish from the water.

![A Handheld Frog being used for fishing.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/725aa96bfc935f8b59ff6b5020e36f1bf9d22ac0_0.webp)

You can pull items from hard-to-reach places.

![A Handheld Frog being used to pull a Diamond Pickaxe from a tree.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65bb3e029a0a3d9ebc036f8432d83448f22d3052.png)

You can pull mobs for any reason you wish.

![A Handheld Frog being used to pull a pig.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4c27200103772a9fed1871cfe265db734f9e3dd.png)

# Can I use Handheld Frogs to get Froglights?

Yes! Just aim your Handheld Frog at a Magma Cube, use it, and receive a froglight.

![A Handheld Frog and some Magma Cubes.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a692ee3d58788fd50545c2d088e8d54c0d9ab807.png)

![A Handheld Frog and some Magma Cubes, with a froglight in the hotbar.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09308e75437dbfb8ceb932bbfbbf1e04013145cd.png)

# Can I hold any frog variant?

Yes! You can hold all three currently existing frog variants.

![All three variants of the Handheld Frog.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89b11101173aa51feaff8b700c67c52fdd2d668e.png)

You can also obtain all three currently existing types of froglights by using each type of frog on Magma Cubes.

![All Handheld Frog variants with all three froglights.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83d17a02c704a3866611bf8379d687cf7bc60661.png)
